steps.title: Spot the problem and response
steps.content: The first sentence says Cristall was largely overlooked by twentieth-century scholars. The next sentence introduces a 2020 analysis that helps illuminate her contributions, so it responds to that neglect.

steps.title: Select the corrective transition
steps.content: A would say the analysis illustrates the neglect, but it counters it. B suggests agreement with the earlier scholars. C treats the analysis as merely additional research, missing the correction of neglect. The transition should signal that the analysis addresses an oversight. The answer is D.
